mnemonics: CAP: Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance - Pick two for your system's view.
keyPoints: Understand the CAP theorem and its trade-offs.
Know the difference between strong and eventual consistency.
Be able to explain common consensus protocols like Paxos and Raft.
commonMistakes: Assuming a distributed system can achieve all three CAP properties simultaneously.
Confusing horizontal scaling with vertical scaling.
Overlooking the importance of idempotency in distributed operations.
